{{Quote|These engines ''still'' need an overhaul!|[[Reti]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]''</ref>}}
The '''''Zoomer''''' was an overhauled [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] belonging to the salvage [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] [[Reti]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:Zoomer_JSF.jpg|thumb|left|180px|''Zoomer'' at the [[Battle of Eos (Invasion of Naboo)|Battle of Eos]]]]

The ''Zoomer'' was manufactured from the parts of wrecked ships, possibly from the [[Stark Hyperspace War/Legends|Stark Hyperspace War]], which Reti himself procured. Having seemingly been built from no blueprints at all, this ship was proof of Reti's skills with a toolkit.

The ''Zoomer'' employed an impressive weapons array. It was armed with two rapid-fire [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] on the lower part of the cockpit and two more cannons on the tips of each wing. Reti also installed a [[Chaingun/Legends|chaingun]] acquired from a [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken]] [[Skiff/Legends|skiff]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], which could bypass energy [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]]. Reti also acquired [[cruise missile]]s, [[Cluster missile/Legends|cluster missiles]], and [[Proximity mine/Legends|proximity mines]] from his cohort [[Nym/Legends|Nym]].

It had a surprisingly large cargo space for a ship of its size due to a smaller [[Sublight engine/Legends|sublight drive]] that was illegally purchased from a disgruntled ship-factory employee. The ''Zoomer'' had a thin, oval cockpit, and cargo hold with two wings on the top and two engine turbines below.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Starfighter (video game)|''Star Wars: Starfighter'']] {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]''
